import axios from"axios";const hostname=window.location.hostname;const apiHost=hostname==="localhost"||hostname==="127.0.0.1"?"localhost":hostname;const API=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||`https://hire-hub-e11k.onrender.com/api`});// Add JWT token automatically if exists
API.interceptors.request.use(req=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(token)req.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;return req;});export default API;
